label: ai-insight-openapi
info: OpenAPI JSON and interactive docs for ORCE endpoints.

swaggerDoc.description: Returns OpenAPI specification for ORCE endpoints.

name: BuildOpenApiSpec
BuildSwaggerUiHtml
GuardOpenApi500SingleResponse
BuildRedocHtml
func:
msg.statusCode = 200;
msg.headers = { 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8' };
msg.payload = `<!doctype html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>AI Insight ORCE ReDoc</title>
  <style>body { margin: 0; padding: 0; }</style>
</head>
<body>
  <redoc spec-url="/openapi.json"></redoc>
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/redoc@2/bundles/redoc.standalone.js"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
return msg;
